decisions.title: Ship Explore V2 to GA by EOD March 31
decisions.context: Multiple GA-blocking items due today: analytics event naming (ENG-9276), default settings (ENG-9134), live mode bugs (ENG-9194), sync mode issues (ENG-9709). This is our flagship 2026 product for 'Nail the Core' pillar.
decisions.blockedBy: 4 critical bugs still open, analytics instrumentation incomplete

arguments.for: Market timing critical. Customers waiting. Delays reduce Q2 adoption runway and impact North Star metric (decisions captured).
arguments.against: Shipping with known bugs damages trust. Analytics gaps blind us to usage patterns. Better to slip 1 week and launch clean.

decisions.title: Prioritize FedRAMP/FIPS compliance over feature velocity in Q2
decisions.context: 5 compliance tickets active (ENG-9695 FIPS S3, ENG-9664 GNA FIPS, ENG-9661 FedRAMP needs, ENG-9662 Amplitude FedRAMP, ENG-9300 MFA requirement). This unlocks enterprise 'Build the Moat' opportunities but taxes eng bandwidth 30-40%.

arguments.for: FedRAMP opens $10M+ gov/finance TAM. Moat pillar needs differentiation. Compliance is existential for enterprise deals in pipeline.
arguments.against: Slows Canvas iterations and Python Rules. Risks Q2 'Embed Deeper' OKRs. Compliance work doesn't directly increase decisions captured short-term.

decisions.title: Consolidate Canvas execution infrastructure before expanding use cases
decisions.context: Canvas helpers being updated (ENG-9506), disposition tracking added (ENG-9828), but simulator needs multi-asset support (ENG-9856) and ingest load testing incomplete (ENG-9778). Foundation shaky before scaling.

arguments.for: Prevents tech debt explosion. Load testing reveals breaking points before customers hit them. Clean abstractions enable faster feature dev later.
arguments.against: Customers need multi-asset simulation now. Infrastructure work invisible to users. Sales needs Canvas wins this quarter for 'Embed Deeper' narrative.

decisions.title: Deprecate legacy PTSID service this quarter vs. carrying dual systems
decisions.context: ENG-9651 removes PTSID service and cache. Clean break vs. maintaining parallel systems. Affects data lineage and processor architecture.

arguments.for: Reduces operational complexity 40%. Eliminates sync bugs between old/new systems. Frees 1.5 eng headcount for product work.
arguments.against: Migration risk to production workflows. Some customers may have hardcoded dependencies. Safer to maintain both through H1 2026.

decisions.title: Block SCIM org email invites now vs. gradual rollout
decisions.context: ENG-9784 blocks admin deactivation, ENG-9785 blocks email invites for SCIM orgs. Security-critical but impacts customer onboarding flows.

arguments.for: Security vulnerability if SCIM and manual provisioning conflict. SOC2/compliance requirement. Prevents privilege escalation attacks.
arguments.against: Breaks current customer workflows. Support tickets will spike. Need 2-week comms buffer and migration tooling first.

timeAudit.weekSummary: GA crunch week: 85% time in sync meetings, war rooms, and unblock sessions. Only 6 focus hours across 5 days.
alerts: Today is Explore V2 GA deadline with 4 blocking bugs open
Zero focus blocks remaining today to make ship/no-ship call
34 meeting hours this week is 2.1x your stated max of 16h
No 1:1s scheduled with Canvas or Python Rules leads this week during critical planning phase
5 compliance initiatives active but no dedicated compliance sync on calendar

events.title: Explore V2 GA Deadline
events.description: Ship/no-ship decision for Explore V2. 4 blockers: analytics events, live mode, sync mode, default settings.

events.title: Amplitude Event Naming Cutoff
events.description: ENG-9276 must merge to capture GA launch analytics correctly. No post-GA renames.

events.title: FedRAMP Prioritization Decision
events.description: Commit to Q2 compliance roadmap or defer. Impacts 5 active work streams and 30-40% eng capacity.

events.title: SCIM Security Rollout Decision
events.description: Block email invites for SCIM orgs now vs. phased rollout. Security vs. UX tradeoff.

events.title: Q2 Planning Kickoff
events.description: Reconcile Nail/Embed/Moat pillar resourcing with compliance tax and GA learnings.

events.title: Canvas Infrastructure Consolidation
events.description: Load testing complete, multi-asset simulator shipped, execution helpers standardized.

events.title: IdP TEC Integration Live
events.description: ENG-8081 ships. First major customer on full SSO/SCIM/IdP stack. Moat pillar proof point.

events.title: Python Rules Q2 Roadmap Review
events.description: Assess if compliance work delays advanced rule features. Embed Deeper pillar dependency.

events.title: PTSID Deprecation Complete
events.description: ENG-9651 removes legacy service. Processor architecture simplified, 1.5 eng freed up.

events.title: Q2 OKR Check-in #1
events.description: North Star metric trend, pillar health, FedRAMP impact on velocity, Explore V2 GA learnings.

events.title: FIPS S3 Encryption Rollout
events.description: ENG-9695 deploys to production. Required for FedRAMP readiness and gov customer trials.
